title: galatella glandulosa
intro: Galatella glandulosa, also known as glandular Galatella or sticky cudweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Galatella glandulosa include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, as well as its possible use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Galatella glandulosa can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
